TRACTIAN focuses on industrial intelligence and machine monitoring systems in the manufacturing sector. The company provides condition monitoring, computerized maintenance management systems (CMMS), and overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) solutions aimed at predicting machine failures and managing maintenance tasks. It was founded in 2019 and is based in Atlanta, Georgia.

DINGO provides predictive maintenance solutions for the mining industry, addressing asset health management and reliability. The company offers software that predicts equipment failures and optimizes maintenance workflows for asset-intensive operations. It was founded in 1991 and is based in Wilston, Australia. results.title: ToolSense Alternative: Offline + AU/NZ | MapTrack
results.content:
MapTrack
MapTrack logo
ToolSense logo

# The ToolSense Alternative That Actually Ships Offline Mobile

MapTrack is the best ToolSense alternative for AU/NZ field operations: offline-first mobile that ships today, AU data residency, transparent per-asset pricing and vendor-neutral access to 150+ telematics, fleet and fuel-card data sources.

Teams switch from ToolSense when they need offline mobile that ships (not 'upcoming'), AU data residency, transparent pricing or multi-industry coverage beyond ToolSense's FM Operations repositioning. ToolSense's Capterra vendor reply dated 12 August 2024 said offline mode would 'go live in a couple months', but offline is still not listed as a feature as of June 2026.

Lachlan McRitchie

Lachlan McRitchie

GM of Operations [...] ## Why teams look for a ToolSense alternative

ToolSense is a strong platform for EU cleaning robotics FM. Teams typically look for alternatives when they need offline mobile that ships, AU/NZ data residency, transparent pricing or multi-industry coverage:

### Offline mobile that ships

ToolSense's Capterra vendor reply dated 12 August 2024 said "Offline Mode for the App will go live in a couple months." Offline is still not listed as a ToolSense feature as of June 2026. MapTrack ships offline-first on all plans today.

### AU data residency + AS/NZS-aware templates

MapTrack is Australian-built with AU data residency on AWS Sydney and AS/NZS-aware compliance templates you adapt to your standard. ToolSense is EU/DACH-focused with no documented AU/NZ presence or local content. [...] ## TL;DR - ToolSense vs MapTrack

## What is ToolSense?

ToolSense is a Vienna-based Asset Operations Platform (repositioning to FM Operations per CEO Alexander Manafi's April 2026 statement) covering QR-code asset tracking, IoT (GPS, runtime, battery, fuel sensors), work orders, maintenance, inspections, scheduling and lifecycle management. Founded in 2017 by Alexander Manafi, Benjamin Petterle and Rostyslav Yavorskyi. Closed a Series A round of EUR 8M in December 2022 (PwC IIoT lead); a FM-Operations repositioning round led by GRO Capital was announced 13 April 2026.

results.title: Best ToolSense Alternatives & Competitors
results.content:
Zapium, formerly known as FieldCircle, is a comprehensive maintenance management platform designed to reduce downtime, automate workflows, and increase operational efficiency across asset-centric industries. It unifies CMMS, field service, and facility maintenance functions into a single system, enabling organizations to manage work orders, preventive maintenance, asset records, and technician dispatching with ease. The platform leverages AI-powered insights and IoT-based condition monitoring to help businesses anticipate failures before they occur and make data-driven maintenance decisions. Zapium also improves technician productivity through mobile tools, geo-tagged updates, approval workflows, and collaboration features that work even in low-connectivity environments. Companies using [...] Starting Price: $420.00/year/user

  Compare vs. ToolSense View Software
 18

  IntelliShift

  ### IntelliShift

  IntelliShift

  IntelliShift offers enterprise field operations an alternative to today’s out-of-the-box telematics and fleet management solutions. The IntelliShift platform connects all aspects of your vehicle and asset operations, and solutions are configured to help you increase productivity, improve safety metrics and reduce in costs per asset. The IntelliShift platform includes AI video, fleet telematics, Inspection software, route management, fuel management, driver safety, compliance, customer management, fleet maintenance, and operational intelligence dashboards.

  Starting Price: $14.98/month/user

  Compare vs. ToolSense View Software

  Ai Field Management [...] Clue is an all-in-one equipment management platform built for construction teams. It brings the office, shop, and field together in one platform, so everyone can access the same equipment information with a single login. With GPS, telematics, fleet tracking, and maintenance tools in one system, teams can see where equipment is, how it is being used, and what it needs next. Clue’s CMMS helps teams stay ahead of downtime by automating preventive maintenance schedules, work orders, and fault code tracking. That means less paperwork, fewer missed services, and faster response when issues come up. Clue also makes dispatch and coordination simpler by improving scheduling, sending real-time maintenance alerts, and keeping everyone aligned, so crews can stay productive and focused on the
